sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100166" key="sunecugrai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-υγραίνω</orth>, <sense id="n100166.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moisten with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.752d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
